title: PR 102 snagging implementation opened
body: Twigged Shedding Fern 019e03 opening PR 102 snagging implementation after Phase 0 refresh. Active-claims registry has no active claims; root commit queue contains only abandoned/expired entries, so no other agents present on live claims. Current evidence: 4 unresolved non-outdated Copilot review threads, Sonar quality gate ERROR with 1 open issue and 2 TO_REVIEW hotspots. Scope stays narrow: graph-layer taxonomy, primitive wording, parser index advancement, and Git subprocess boundary only; no Practice Core edits, no broader graph rewrite, no feature expansion.
